notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, shields, waves, mystery ship) but alien sprites are extremely minimal/broken-looking (just small rectangles), the alien hit detection uses hardcoded offsets that don't match actual sprite sizes, and the march sound uses only 2 tones cycling instead of 4.
Game crashes due to a null reference error when the player shoots any shield except the rightmost one, and alien hitboxes are severely misaligned.

Core loop works with shooting, waves, shields, and game-over states, but several Space Invaders details are rough or flawed, including simplistic visuals, odd alien firing column logic, no bunker shaping, and questionable wave/state handling.
